subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — vendor booth question
body_tmpl: Hi, my name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I run a small food business out of my home kitchen. I heard the Taste of Bellwood is coming up on {DATE} and I'd love to apply for a vendor booth. Could you send me the application and let me know what the booth fee is this year? Also wondering if there's a deadline I need to hit. Thanks so much.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thanks for your interest! Vendor applications for the Taste of Bellwood ({DATE}) are available at Village Hall or by emailing this address. The booth fee is {AMOUNT} for a 10x10 space. Applications are due by {DATE}. Let me know if you have other questions!

subject_tmpl: Broken swing set at {STREET} park
body_tmpl: {FIRST} here, resident on {STREET}. Stopped by the park near {CROSS} with my kids yesterday ({DATE}) and noticed two of the swings are broken — the chains are snapped on one and the seat is cracked on the other. My daughter is {AGE} and loves those swings. Can someone come out and fix them before the weekend? Kids play there every day.

subject_tmpl: Splash pad hours this summer?
body_tmpl: Hello — I wanted to ask about the splash pad hours for this summer. Last year it opened at 10am but I thought I heard they were changing the hours. Do you know when it opens and closes each day and if there are any days it's closed for maintenance? My kids and I are planning our whole summer schedule around it. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}! The splash pad will be open daily {TIME}–{TIME} from Memorial Day through Labor Day. It is closed on Tuesdays for routine maintenance. We'll post updated signage at the site as well. Enjoy the summer!

subject_tmpl: Ballfield reservation for {DATE}
body_tmpl: We have a community softball league that plays every summer and we'd like to reserve the ballfield on {STREET} for the season. We usually need it on {DAYS} evenings starting around {TIME}. How do I go about getting that scheduled and is there a rental fee? Group contact is {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: More summer programming for teens please
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — I'm a parent of three teenagers on {STREET} and I want to raise something that I think a lot of families feel. We have young people with nothing structured to do in the summer. The splash pad is great for little ones but there's almost nothing for teens. Could the Village look at adding some programming — sports leagues, job shadowing, arts — something to keep them engaged? Happy to volunteer if needed. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Park on {STREET} needs mowing — embarrassing condition
body_tmpl: Good morning. The park at {STREET} and {CROSS} hasn't been mowed in at least {DAYS} days. The grass is knee-high and there's litter all over the picnic area. We pay taxes for this upkeep and it's just not happening. I've mentioned this to a neighbor who said they emailed before with no response. Please send a crew out this week. — {NAME}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hello {NAME}, I apologize for the delay in maintenance at that location. We've dispatched a crew and it will be addressed by {DATE}. Thank you for letting us know.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — live music lineup?
body_tmpl: Hi there! Super excited for the Taste of Bellwood this year. Do you have a lineup of performers yet? My family loves the live music and we try to time our arrival around the acts. Also will there be kids' activities again like last year? We loved the bounce house. Thanks! {FIRST} from {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: Pavilion rental for family reunion on {DATE}
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm looking to reserve the park pavilion for a family reunion on {DATE}. We'll have roughly {NUM} people. I wanted to know the rental fee, whether we can bring our own grill, and if there are electrical outlets available. Name is {FIRST} {LAST}, you can reach me at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}! The pavilion rental fee is {AMOUNT} for a full-day reservation. Yes, personal grills are permitted and there are two electrical outlets available. I'll send you a reservation form — please return it with payment by {DATE} to confirm your date.

subject_tmpl: Dog waste problem at {STREET} park
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I walk through the park on {STREET} every morning and the dog waste situation is out of control. The bag dispenser has been empty for {DAYS} days and nobody is refilling it. People walk their dogs and just leave it. My kids play on that grass. Can you please make sure the dispensers are stocked and maybe add a sign reminding owners? This has been an ongoing problem. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Basketball court lights not working — {STREET}
body_tmpl: The basketball court lights at {STREET} and {CROSS} have been out for about a week. We play evenings after work and now it gets dark too early to use the courts safely. Can you get those lights repaired? We've got a big group that uses that court — probably {NUM} regulars. Would really appreciate a quick fix. Thanks, {FIRST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thanks for the heads-up. We've submitted a work order and expect the lighting repairs to be completed by {DATE}. Sorry for the inconvenience.

subject_tmpl: Trash cans overflowing at Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Hi — I was at the Taste of Bellwood last {DATE} and wanted to give some feedback. The food was amazing and we had a great time overall. However, the trash cans were completely overflowing by {TIME} and there was garbage on the ground near the main stage. Could you add more bins or increase how often they're emptied next year? Didn't want to dampen the fun but thought you should know. {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Soccer field scheduling — {DATE} season
body_tmpl: Good afternoon, I coach a youth soccer team (ages {AGE}) and we'd like to get on the schedule for the field at {STREET}. We need it on {DAYS} afternoons, roughly {TIME}–{TIME}, for the season starting {DATE}. Could you let me know availability and how to reserve? Contact info: {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Thank you for the new playground equipment!
body_tmpl: Dear Mayor Okonkwo — just a quick note to say thank you. The new playground equipment installed on {STREET} is wonderful. My grandchildren, ages {AGE}, were absolutely thrilled when they saw it. The whole neighborhood has been out there enjoying it. It's the kind of improvement that really makes Bellwood feel like a great place to raise a family. Thank you and your team. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you so much for the kind words! It was a priority for us to invest in our parks for families just like yours. We hope the kids enjoy it for many years to come.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood parking situation
body_tmpl: Hi, coming to the Taste of Bellwood from out of town to visit family on {STREET}. Wanted to ask — where is the best place to park? Last time I came the lots were full and we ended up quite far away. Is there overflow parking or a shuttle this year? Thank you, {FIRST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}! We'll have overflow parking available at {ADDRESS} with a free shuttle running every {NUM} minutes. Main lots open at {TIME}. We recommend arriving early for the best spots!

subject_tmpl: Splash pad not working — {DATE}
body_tmpl: We took the kids to the splash pad on {DATE} around {TIME} and it was completely off. No water at all. Sign said it was open. Waited {NUM} minutes hoping it would come back on but nothing. Other families were there too, equally confused and disappointed. Is there an outage or maintenance issue? Can you give us a heads-up when it's back online? — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Request for senior fitness programming at parks
body_tmpl: Hello, my name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm a senior resident on {STREET}. Several of my friends and I would love to see some low-impact fitness programming in the parks — things like chair yoga, tai chi, or walking groups. Many of us don't have transportation to go elsewhere. Even something once a week would be wonderful. Is this something the Village is considering? Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, thank you for this great suggestion. We are exploring outdoor senior programming and your feedback is very helpful. We'll be in touch as plans develop — likely for a {DATE} launch.

subject_tmpl: Vandalism at {STREET} park shelter
body_tmpl: I noticed graffiti on the park shelter at {STREET} and {CROSS} this morning ({DATE}). It's pretty extensive — covers most of one wall. I took a photo if that's helpful. This kind of thing makes the park feel unsafe and unwelcoming, especially for families. Can you send a crew to clean it up and maybe look at adding lighting or cameras to deter this? — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood volunteer signup
body_tmpl: Hi! I'd like to volunteer at this year's Taste of Bellwood. I helped out at the {DATE} event and it was a blast. I'm available {DAYS} and can do setup, trash collection, whatever you need. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and you can reach me at {PHONE} or this email. Looking forward to it!
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}! So glad to have you back. I'll add you to our volunteer list for {DAYS}. We'll send a full briefing email closer to the event. Thank you for giving your time!

subject_tmpl: Picnic table missing at {STREET} park
body_tmpl: There used to be {NUM} picnic tables near the shelter at {STREET} park. One has been missing for a while now — I'm not sure if it was removed for repair or just taken. We use those tables for small family gatherings all the time. Can you let me know what happened to it and when it will be back? — {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Idea: outdoor movie nights in the park
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — first, thank you for your continued work on making Bellwood a better place. I had a suggestion for a parks program: outdoor movie nights. A projector, a white sheet, and some free movies in the park on Friday nights. It brings people together, it's inexpensive, and it's something families and seniors can all enjoy. Other nearby towns do this with great results. Just wanted to share the idea. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}

subject_tmpl: Water fountain broken at park on {STREET}
body_tmpl: The drinking fountain at the {STREET} park is not working. I noticed it on {DATE} — the handle turns but no water comes out. With the heat we've been having, this is really a safety issue, especially for kids playing there. Please fix it as soon as possible. My name is {FIRST} and my address is {ADDRESS}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for reporting this. We've flagged it as a priority and a crew will assess and repair the fountain by {DATE}. We appreciate you looking out for park visitors.

subject_tmpl: Can parks do more holiday events?
body_tmpl: Hello — we have lived on {STREET} for {NUM} years and love this neighborhood. One thing I wish we had more of is seasonal events — a Halloween in the Park, a holiday light display in December, maybe an Easter egg hunt. These bring communities together. I know the Village does the Taste of Bellwood but what about smaller events through the year? Who do I talk to about suggesting these? — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — accessibility question
body_tmpl: Hi, my mother uses a wheelchair and we'd like to bring her to the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE}. Could you let me know whether the event grounds are wheelchair accessible — paved paths, accessible restrooms, ADA parking nearby? We want to make sure she has a comfortable experience. Thank you, {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, absolutely — the event grounds are fully accessible. Paved pathways connect all areas, accessible restrooms are available near the main entrance, and ADA parking is reserved at {ADDRESS}. We look forward to seeing you and your mother!

subject_tmpl: Playground equipment unsafe — rusted bolts
body_tmpl: I want to flag a safety concern at the playground near {STREET} and {CROSS}. Several of the bolts on the climbing structure are visibly rusted through. I'm worried a bolt could fail while a child is on the equipment. This needs to be looked at immediately — I have {AGE}-year-olds and I wouldn't let them play there right now. Please send someone to inspect it. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, thank you for bringing this to our attention. We are treating this as a priority safety matter. The equipment will be inspected by {DATE} and taken out of service if needed until repairs are made. We appreciate your diligence.

subject_tmpl: Ballfield lights schedule — early shutoff
body_tmpl: Our men's softball league uses the ballfield on {STREET} on {DAYS} nights. The lights have been shutting off at {TIME} but our games often run past that. Is it possible to extend the lighting to {TIME}? We're willing to pay any additional fee. Please let me know who can authorize this. — {FIRST}, captain, {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood sponsorship inquiry — {BIZ}
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm reaching out on behalf of {BIZ}, located at {ADDRESS} on St. Charles Rd. We're interested in sponsoring the Taste of Bellwood this year and would love to learn about available sponsorship tiers and what benefits come with each level. We've been a Bellwood business for {NUM} years and feel this is a great way to give back. Please contact me at {PHONE} or this email. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reaching out! We'd love to have {BIZ} as a sponsor. I'll send our full sponsorship packet to this email — packages range from {AMOUNT} to {AMOUNT} and include signage, booth space, and social media recognition. Let's connect soon!

subject_tmpl: Geese problem at park — {STREET}
body_tmpl: We love our park on {STREET} but the Canada geese have completely taken over. There is goose waste all over the grass and walking paths. My kids can't play without stepping in it. I've heard other municipalities use dogs or noise deterrents. Could the Village look into this? It's been getting worse every year. — {NAME}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Request for benches along {STREET} walking path
body_tmpl: Good morning. I walk the path along {STREET} almost every day with my husband who has difficulty walking long distances. We have noticed there are very few benches along the route — just {NUM} that I can count, spread over a long stretch. Could the Village consider adding more seating? It would help seniors and people with mobility issues enjoy the path. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for the thoughtful suggestion. We'll include additional seating along the {STREET} path in our next parks improvement review. I'll note your contact information for updates.

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood feedback — very positive!
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to write and say that the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE} was the best one yet. The organization was smooth, the acts were great, and the food variety was excellent. My family comes every year and this was our favorite. Please pass along our thanks to whoever runs it. The Village should be proud. — {FIRST} and family, {STREET}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, what wonderful news — thank you! The Parks team works so hard to make the Taste of Bellwood special and I'll make sure they see your message. We're already excited for next year!

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — street closure and barricades needed {DATE}
body_tmpl: Frank — wanted to coordinate early this year. For the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE} we'll need the standard street closures on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS}, plus barricades set by {TIME}. Can your crew confirm availability? Also last year the portable restroom delivery trucks had issues at {ADDRESS} — can we designate a better staging area this time? Let me know. — Kevin
reply_tmpl: Kevin — we're good on the date. I'll schedule crew for setup at {TIME} on {DATE}. For staging, let's use the lot at {ADDRESS} — more room for trucks. I'll confirm headcount closer to the event.

subject_tmpl: Security staffing request — Taste of Bellwood {DATE}
body_tmpl: Reggie — can you confirm how many officers we'll have assigned to Taste of Bellwood this year? Last year we had {NUM} uniformed officers and it worked well but the crowd was a bit larger toward the end. Event runs {TIME}–{TIME} on {DATE}. Let me know what you need from me for the security plan. Thanks, Kevin.
reply_tmpl: Kevin — I'll have {NUM} officers plus {NUM} in reserve on {DATE}. I'll circulate a site map for positioning. Let's do a walkthrough on {DATE} at {TIME} if you're available.

subject_tmpl: Sand in sandbox needs replacing — {STREET} playground
body_tmpl: Hi, the sandbox at the playground on {STREET} has sand that is very dirty and compacted. I noticed what looked like broken glass in there last {DATE} morning. With little kids playing in sandboxes, this seems like a real hazard. Can someone come clean it out and replace the sand? My son is {AGE} and loves that sandbox. Thanks, {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for letting us know — broken glass in a sandbox is absolutely a priority. We'll have it inspected and the sand replaced by {DATE}. Please keep children away from that area in the meantime.

subject_tmpl: Early morning noise at park construction — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello, crews have been working at the park on {STREET} starting as early as {TIME}. I'm a night-shift worker and this wakes me up. Is there a Village ordinance about construction hours? The project seems great — I support the improvements — but I'd appreciate knowing when the early mornings will end. — {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood food vendor complaint
body_tmpl: Hi — I attended the Taste of Bellwood on {DATE} and had a bad experience with one vendor. The food was undercooked and my family felt sick afterward. I don't know the vendor's name but the booth was located near {ADDRESS}. I'm not looking for anything other than to make sure it's looked into before next year. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, we're very sorry to hear this and take food safety seriously. I've passed this along to our Health Officer for review. If you are able to share any additional details (booth description, time of purchase) that would help us identify the vendor. Thank you for letting us know.

subject_tmpl: Splash pad — fee or free this summer?
body_tmpl: Quick question — I heard a rumor that the Village was thinking about charging an admission fee for the splash pad this summer. My family uses it constantly and we're on a tight budget. Is this true? We really hope not. The free splash pad is one of the best things about Bellwood in the summer. — {FIRST}, {STREET}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, no worries — the splash pad remains free and open to all residents this summer. No admission fee planned. We'll see you there!

subject_tmpl: Petition: keep {STREET} park open later
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm writing on behalf of a group of {NUM} neighbors who use the park on {STREET} regularly. We'd like to request that the park closing time be extended from {TIME} to {TIME} during summer months. Families with older kids and working parents often can't get there until the evening. I have signatures from neighbors if you'd like them. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}

subject_tmpl: Trees blocking light in park — safety concern at night
body_tmpl: Hi there — the overgrown trees on the east side of the park at {STREET} are blocking the path lights at night, making it very dark and a bit scary to walk through. I've had a few neighbors mention the same thing. Could the trees be trimmed back so the lights do their job? Thanks for considering this. — {FIRST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, thank you for flagging this. We'll have our parks crew assess the tree trimming needs at that location — it should be addressed by {DATE}. Your safety concern is noted and appreciated.

subject_tmpl: Investing in parks — long-term vision?
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — I'm a longtime resident of {STREET} and I've been pleased with recent park improvements. I wanted to ask: does the Village have a long-term parks master plan? I'd love to see more shade structures, a new fitness path, and better lighting across all parks. Bellwood's parks could really shine with a sustained vision. Are there public meetings where residents can weigh in? — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood — noise complaint from neighbor
body_tmpl: My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I live at {ADDRESS}, about a block from where the Taste of Bellwood is held. Last year the music from the event was extremely loud and went until {TIME} at night. I enjoy the event in principle but {DAYS} of that noise level in a residential area is too much. Can you tell me what hours the amplified music runs this year and whether there are any sound limits? Thank you.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for your feedback. This year amplified music will conclude by {TIME} each evening. We've also adjusted speaker placement to direct sound away from residential streets. We appreciate your patience.

subject_tmpl: Fencing around splash pad — child safety request
body_tmpl: I have a {AGE}-year-old who loves the splash pad but the area has no fence. My child can run off into the parking area in seconds. Could the Village consider adding a low fence around the splash pad perimeter to keep young children contained and safer? Other splash pads I've seen have this. I'd be happy to speak at a council meeting if that helps move it along. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {STREET}

subject_tmpl: Great job at Taste of Bellwood this year
body_tmpl: Hi Kevin — I don't usually send emails like this but I just had to say the Taste of Bellwood was outstanding this year. The layout was better, the trash situation was managed well, and the lineup was great. You and your team clearly put in a lot of work. My kids talk about it every year as one of the highlights of their summer. Really appreciate what you do for this community. — {FIRST}, {STREET}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you so much — this genuinely made my day. Our team pours a lot of heart into this event and hearing from residents like you makes it all worthwhile. See you next year!

subject_tmpl: Winter ice rink — is it coming back?
body_tmpl: Hello, I remember {NUM} years ago the Village had a small outdoor ice rink near {STREET}. Is that a program that could come back? My kids are at the age where they'd love it and there's not a lot for families to do outside in January. Even a small rink or a skating program would be great. Just wanted to put it out there. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Taste of Bellwood budget — {DATE} event
body_tmpl: David — I wanted to check in on the budget approval timeline for the Taste of Bellwood. We need to put deposits down on entertainment and equipment rental by {DATE} or we lose the slots. Total estimated cost is {AMOUNT}, which is within what was discussed at the last budget session. Can you confirm that's approved or who I need to talk to? Thanks, Kevin.
reply_tmpl: Kevin — I'll get you a written confirmation by {DATE}. Budget is in line with what we allocated. Go ahead and hold the vendors but don't sign final contracts until you hear from me. — David

subject_tmpl: Dead tree in park — hazard near playground
body_tmpl: There is a large dead tree at the edge of the playground on {STREET}, very close to the swings. After the wind we had on {DATE} I'm genuinely worried it could come down on a child. Can someone look at this quickly? I've pointed it out to other parents and everyone is concerned. Please treat this as urgent. — {FIRST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, thank you for flagging this urgently. I've contacted Public Works for an emergency assessment — someone will be on site by {DATE}. We'll act on the arborist's recommendation immediately.

subject_tmpl: Park clean-up volunteer day — can we organize one?
body_tmpl: Hi, I'm a resident on {STREET} and I'm interested in helping organize a community park clean-up day this {DATE}. I've done this in other communities and it builds a lot of goodwill and pride. Would the Village supply trash bags and gloves if residents volunteer their time? Who should I coordinate with? My name is {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, we love this idea! Yes — the Village will provide gloves, bags, and pickup service. Let's talk about a date. I'll reach out to you at {PHONE} to coordinate. Thank you for stepping up!
